# Data import

data structure

metabolomics platform

exposure variables

outcome definitions

# Data preprocessing

Typical metabolomics steps:

missing value handling

normalization

transformation (log scaling)

batch correction

scaling (z-score)

# Study design & sample splitting

training vs test dataset

cross-validation

internal validation

avoiding overfitting

# Building the MMS

feature selection

model training

score construction

LASSO metabolite selection

elastic net models

weighted metabolite scores

# Model evaluation

R²

RMSE

ROC / AUC

calibration

Also include:

permutation testing

cross-validation results

# Robustness and reproducibility

sensitivity analyses

stability of metabolite selection

reproducibility across folds
